description: Rewrite 5 fake QuantSync components from object-tree format to real React JSX with Tailwind CSS: CommunityCard, FeedToggle, PostComposer, TrendingSidebar, VoteButtons.
steps: Read apps/quantsync/src/types/index.ts to understand PostType, MediaAttachment, and other types
Rewrite apps/quantsync/src/components/CommunityCard.tsx: Convert to JSX community display card.
Rewrite apps/quantsync/src/components/FeedToggle.tsx: Convert to JSX feed type toggle component.

Rewrite apps/quantsync/src/components/PostComposer.tsx: Convert to JSX rich post editor with textarea, poll editor, thread editor, toolbar (media/poll/thread/GIF/anonymous), and footer (char count + submit button).
Rewrite apps/quantsync/src/components/TrendingSidebar.tsx: Convert to JSX trending topics sidebar.
Rewrite apps/quantsync/src/components/VoteButtons.tsx: Convert to JSX upvote/downvote buttons with score display. Keep formatScore helper.
Verify: Run `pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quantsync` passes with 0 errors.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 QuantSync files return JSX (not object trees)
grep -n "type: 'div'" across all 5 files returns 0 matches
All files maintain their original Props interfaces
All files use Tailwind CSS classes
Export structure preserved (named export + default export)
